mapper.sql: select t.id, t.user_id, t.content, t.images, t.like_count, t.comment_count, t.collect_count, t.status, t.deleted, t.ip_address, t.browser, t.system, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, u.id as ref_user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar from b_treehole t left join b_user u on t.user_id = u.id
mapper.insert: insert into b_treehole (user_id, content, images, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, status, deleted, ip_address, browser, system, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{content}, #{images}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, ifnull(#{collectCount}, 0), #{status}, #{deleted}, #{ipAddress}, #{browser}, #{system}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update b_treehole set user_id = #{userId}, content = #{content}, images = #{images}, like_count = #{likeCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, collect_count = ifnull(#{collectCount}, collect_count), status = #{status}, ip_address = #{ipAddress}, browser = #{browser}, system = #{system}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: update b_treehole set deleted = 1, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}

update b_treehole set deleted = 1, update_time = sysdate() where id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update b_treehole set like_count = like_count + 1 where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update b_treehole set like_count = if(ifnull(like_count, 0) > 0, like_count - 1, 0) where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update b_treehole set comment_count = comment_count + 1 where id = #{id}
update b_treehole set collect_count = ifnull(collect_count, 0) + 1 where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update b_treehole set collect_count = if(ifnull(collect_count, 0) > 0, collect_count - 1, 0) where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
